prompt: Security audit finding, needs fixing today: after a password reset we call revokeUser, but users with several open sessions keep one that still works — and revokeUser returns a count that doesn't match what it actually removed. On top of that the nightly sweep never gets the store back down to the live-session count; it stays thousands of rows fat no matter how often it runs. `node --test test_sessions.ts` reproduces both. Fix sessions.ts — the tests are the acceptance bar, leave them be.
